---
title: "포함, 제외"
categories: [웹사이트, 리스팅, 포함, 제외]
date: "2026-04-01"
date-modified: "2026-04-12"
toc: true
---

리스팅 포함 또는 제외 설정

#### 포함(Including)

```yml
---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  include:
    author: "{Harlow,Tristan}*"
----
```

#### 제외(Excluding)

```yml
---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  exclude:
    author: "Charles*"
---
```
